steps.title: Choose a unique feature branch name for this process and respond with it in chat

Run `bun run agent:prepare-worker-surface -- <feature-branch-name>` to ensure a worker is ready, create the worker-hosted feature-branch worktree from `origin/development`, run `bun install`, and print the resulting `start_command` for entering that worktree
Did worker setup complete successfully and produce a usable worker worktree entrypoint?

decision.prompt: Did worker setup complete successfully and produce a usable worker worktree entrypoint?

options.title: Worker setup failed or did not produce a usable worker worktree entrypoint
Worker setup completed and produced a usable worker worktree entrypoint
